# Transcrição: This_is_what_inspires_me

- **Fonte:** This_is_what_inspires_me
- **Duração:** 01:06
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:06]

The short time that we have here in life, to me, is a motivator. This book of mine, representing my life, maybe I've got nine chapters, maybe I've got four chapters, maybe I'm on my last chapter. I hope I don't die any time too soon. But again, this book is short and I'm inspired to write a book with many different chapters. You know, there was a part of my life where I was a student, there's a part of my life where I worked in a petrol station, there's a part of my life where I worked in a takeaway store, there's a part of my life where I was a professional magician, there's a part of my life where I was a keynote speaker, there's a part of my life where I taught magic and this is a part of my life where I'm teaching communication skills. And what inspires me right now is before this book is over, before my book ends, I want to write as many different chapters as I can. I want to experience as many different things as I can. We're all writing a book that is our lives. You may be on chapter one, you may be near the end of your book. My friends, regardless, just remember one thing. You are the author of your own story. You're the one holding the pen. Don't think to yourself somebody else is holding your pen. You're the one holding your pen. Write the story you want to write. Live the life you want to live. Take some risks and have some fun along the way.
